text: I feel a sense of curiosity and anticipation as I cross the threshold into this thoughtfully curated space. The vibrant colors and digital displays suggest a celebration of research and development. The quote—"The darkness here is thick, only faintly pierced by a distant light..."—resonates with me. It evokes feelings of both uncertainty and hope, inviting introspection. I feel both small and significant, surrounded by innovation, as if I’m stepping into the threshold between the known and the yet-to-be-discovered.
